description: Free x402 passthrough for DexScreener token/pair data, search and latest token profiles. New-launch / meme radar data for trading agents. Data by DexScreener.

endpoints.description: All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}
zh-CN.title: All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}
endpoints.title: All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs all DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses through the dexscreener-dex-data-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.description: DexScreener DEX Pairs & New-Listing API (TRON x402, Free)（TRON） 通过 x402 gateway 提供公开数据访问，适合 Agent 在金融分析、交易研究、风险筛查和数据聚合流程中调用。
zh-CN.subtitle: DEX 交易对、行情与新盘数据
zh-CN.title: DexScreener
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

subtitle: DEX pairs, prices & new listings
title: DexScreener
use_case: Use to look up a token's DEX pairs/price/liquidity, search tokens, or pull the latest token profiles for new-launch / meme screening.
